module.title: SAP TM Freight Settlement & Charge Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand freight settlement
learningObjectives.description: Explain settlement as the final SAP TM process that validates and pays carrier charges.

learningObjectives.title: Understand settlement inputs
learningObjectives.description: Describe freight order, agreement, carrier, and POD data used in settlement.

learningObjectives.title: Understand finance integration
learningObjectives.description: Clarify how FSD posting integrates SAP TM with SAP S/4HANA Finance.

sections.content: Freight Settlement is the final business process in SAP Transportation Management. It calculates transportation charges, verifies freight agreements, generates Freight Settlement Documents (FSDs) and integrates with SAP S/4HANA Financial Accounting for carrier payment. Freight Settlement ensures that carriers are paid accurately according to contractual agreements.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Transportation Planning creates shipments, Transportation Execution delivers shipments and Freight Settlement pays the carrier.

After delivering goods from Hyderabad to Chennai, SAP TM retrieves the applicable freight agreement, calculates transportation charges based on weight and distance, creates a Freight Settlement Document and posts the accounting entries to SAP S/4HANA Finance for carrier payment.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Generate Freight Settlement only after successful Proof of Delivery and completion of transportation execution to avoid incorrect carrier payments.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A logistics company automated Freight Settlement for more than 12,000 shipments every month, reducing manual invoice processing time by over 80%.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Freight Settlement Document (FSD) is the financial document generated by SAP TM to calculate carrier charges and integrate them with SAP Finance.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Freight Settlement is not the same as carrier invoicing. SAP TM first calculates and validates charges before financial payment processing.

items: Freight Settlement is the final SAP TM process.
Freight Settlement Document is generated after execution.
Charges are calculated using freight agreements.
Settlement integrates SAP TM with SAP Finance.
Proof of Delivery usually precedes Freight Settlement.
